episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 344: Magic 30th Edition & The Future of the Reserved List
episode.description: James and Derek guide you through all the latest in Magic the Gathering and MTGFinance news and products including Modern & Pioneer MTGO metagame analysis, Fast Movers, Cards to Watch and a sweeping discussion of the planned $1000 M30 list featuring dual lands and the Power 9!
